storyDescription: Async self-learning update — LearningEngine with non-blocking background update, pattern analysis, context persistence (FR23, FR24, FR25, NFR13)
implementationLog: - triggerAsyncUpdate(sessionId) — schedules background update via setImmediate,
- _backgroundUpdate(sessionId) — full pipeline: load session context → save history
→ analyze patterns → update context for future sessions
- isUpdating() — always returns false (completely non-blocking, no locks)
- _recordWithRetry(sessionContext, sessionId) — up to 3 retries with 1s delay
* frequentL3Topics from historical and current session L3 keywords
* userProfile with session count, avg depth, risk stats
block distribution, L3 keywords, risk categorization
* Transactional write (temp → rename) for crash safety
* Merges with existing context (no data loss)
- _loadSessionContext(sessionId) — tries SessionManager then direct file read
never blocks response delivery, errors only logged
Updated sprint-status.yaml: story 5-4 → done, epic-5 → done
All 5 epics and 28 stories completed for Мамкин аналитик.
